moduleDescription: This module implements a mimetypes database

entries.name: newMimetypes
entries.description: Creates a new Mimetypes database. The database will contain the most common mimetypes.

entries.name: getMimetype
entries.code:
func getMimetype(mimedb: MimeDB; ext: string; default = "text/plain"): string {.
    raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Gets mimetype which corresponds to ext. Returns default if ext could not be found. ext can start with an optional dot which is ignored. ext is lowercased before querying mimedb.

entries.name: getExt
entries.code:
func getExt(mimedb: MimeDB; mimetype: string; default = "txt"): string {.
    raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Gets extension which corresponds to mimetype. Returns default if mimetype could not be found. Extensions are returned without the leading dot. mimetype is lowercased before querying mimedb.

entries.name: register
entries.code:
func register(mimedb: var MimeDB; ext: string; mimetype: string) {.raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Adds mimetype to the mimedb. mimetype and ext are lowercased before registering on mimedb.
